business_question: Which brands sell the most units during promotional periods?
business_context: Marketing teams need to understand which brands benefit most from promotions.
sql_answer:
WITH brand_promo_sales AS (
SELECT
p.BRAND,
SUM(f.PROMO_UNITS_SOLD) AS TOTAL_PROMO_UNITS,
SUM(f.PROMO_REVENUE) AS TOTAL_PROMO_REVENUE,
COUNT(DISTINCT f.PROMOTION_KEY) AS PROMOTION_COUNT
FROM FACT_PROMOTION_PERFORMANCE f
JOIN DIM_PRODUCT p
ON f.PRODUCT_KEY = p.PRODUCT_KEY
GROUP BY p.BRAND
)

SELECT
BRAND,
TOTAL_PROMO_UNITS,
TOTAL_PROMO_REVENUE,
PROMOTION_COUNT,
ROUND(
TOTAL_PROMO_UNITS /
NULLIF(PROMOTION_COUNT,0),
2
) AS AVG_UNITS_PER_PROMOTION
FROM brand_promo_sales
ORDER BY TOTAL_PROMO_UNITS DESC;
